title: Uber Layoffs 2026: Is AI The Reason? Which Teams Are Impacted And What Employees Will Receive
description: Amid growing speculations, Uber has clarified that the job cuts are not related to artificial intelligence.
content: Uber is laying off 23% of its staff from human resources and recruitment teams as part of a broader restructuring effort led by new president Jill Hazelbaker. CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said the changes are needed to improve the effectiveness of the depar... [1841 chars]

title: Broadcom earnings deep dive: AI growth vs. Market expectations
description: Broadcom reported another strong quarter, driven by booming demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure. Revenue climbed 48% year-over-year to $22.19 billion, while adjusted earnings per share rose 54% to $2.44. Despite beating expectations and issuing strong guidance, the stock declined in after-hours trading as investors focused on the company's AI outlook. (Sources: CNBC, WSJ, Yahoo Finance, MarketWatch) ​Broadcom Delivers Strong Earnings, But Stock Tumbles

title: Google ordered to make changes to AI search summaries by UK

title: Trump plans to support US coal facilities
description: The US administration has framed energy issues in existential terms as it eyes the domestic need to sustain power-hungry artificial-intelligence data centers and aims to marginalize foreign adversaries that hold large fossil fuel reserves
content:
US President Donald Trump is planning to use Cold War-era national defense powers to send nearly $700 million to support coal facilities, according to a White House official.

title: Uber layoffs 23% of its HR workforce; CEO says ‘Changes are necessary’
description: While Uber joins the long list of ongoing tech layoffs, the company claims that the decision is not driven by artificial intelligence.
content: Uber has reportedly reduced 23% of its HR and people-operations workforce as it plans to streamline operations. The decision is being led by its new president, Jill Hazelbaker, but the company does not link the layoffs to AI-driven restructuring. The... [1804 chars]
